What We Do

Our Services

Comprehensive commercial vehicle engineering and maintenance services, built for Singapore's demanding logistics industry.

🔧

Vehicle Repair & Maintenance

Comprehensive scheduled servicing for trucks, prime movers and commercial fleets using genuine parts.

❄️

Air-Con Servicing

Full diagnostic, regassing and component replacement for commercial vehicle cabin climate systems.

🛞

Brake & Suspension

Safety-critical work on braking systems, axles, leaf springs and suspension components for heavy vehicles.

⚙️

Engine Overhaul

Major engine rebuilds, top-end overhauls and full diagnostic restorations for diesel and turbo powertrains.

🚨

24-Hour Breakdown

Round-the-clock recovery and on-site repair across Singapore with priority response for fleet clients.

📋

Fleet Management

Tailored servicing programmes, LTA inspection support, compliance reporting and uptime management.

About Us

About / Why Choose Us

R&S Engineering Works Pte Ltd is Singapore's trusted commercial vehicle engineering specialist. With over 20 years of experience and a 54,000 sq ft facility, our team services lorries, prime movers, and commercial fleets with precision and reliability.

We are a bilingual team committed to delivering quality workmanship, transparent pricing, and fast turnaround — so your vehicles stay on the road.

Full Service List

Everything We Offer

🔧

Vehicle Repair & Maintenance

From routine inspections to major overhauls, our certified technicians keep your commercial vehicles running at peak reliability. We handle lorries, prime movers, curtainsiders, flatbeds, and specialised commercial vehicles using genuine OEM-grade parts and proven workmanship.

Enquire Now →
❄️

Air-Con Servicing

We service all makes of commercial vehicle air-conditioning systems — leak detection, compressor replacement, evaporator and condenser repair, regassing and full diagnostic checks. Keeping your drivers cool through long-haul shifts is critical to productivity.

Enquire Now →
🛞

Brake & Suspension

Drum and disc brake servicing, air brake systems, leaf-spring rebuilds, shock absorber replacement, and full suspension geometry checks for heavy commercial vehicles. Safety-critical work carried out to LTA compliance standards.

Enquire Now →
⚙️

Engine Overhaul

In-house engine bay capable of handling diesel and turbocharged commercial powertrains — from injector calibration to complete bottom-end rebuilds. We work with Hino, Isuzu, Mercedes, MAN, Scania, and other major commercial platforms.

Enquire Now →
🚨

24-Hour Breakdown

A breakdown shouldn't stop your business. Our 24-hour hotline dispatches mobile mechanics and recovery crews island-wide, with priority response for fleet contract clients. On-site diagnostics and roadside repair wherever your vehicle breaks down.

Enquire Now →
📋

Fleet Management

Dedicated account managers, scheduled preventative maintenance, LTA inspection support, parts inventory management, and consolidated monthly reporting — built for operators that depend on maximum uptime and compliance.

Enquire Now →

Not Sure Which Service You Need?

Talk to our team and we'll recommend the right solution for your vehicle and fleet.

About R&S Engineering

Over two decades of trusted commercial vehicle engineering in Singapore.

Our Story

Singapore's Trusted Engineering Specialist

R&S Engineering Works Pte Ltd has been servicing Singapore's commercial vehicle industry for over 20 years. What started as a small workshop has grown into a 54,000 sq ft facility capable of handling 20 or more vehicles simultaneously.

We serve lorry operators, prime mover fleets, logistics companies, and corporate vehicle managers across Singapore. Our bilingual team brings deep technical expertise, transparent pricing, and a genuine commitment to keeping your fleet on the road.

As a BizSafe certified workshop, we operate to the highest standards of safety and quality — backed by LTA-compliant processes and a team that takes pride in every vehicle that leaves our yard.

Our Journey

Company Milestones

1
Est. 2000
Founded as a small commercial vehicle repair workshop
2
2010
Expanded to 54,000 sq ft facility, added engine overhaul bay
3
2015
Secured first major fleet management contracts
4
2024
Digital transformation — fleet reporting and online booking
